name: Your Campus Life Can't Get More Complicated Than This
description:
Welcome to St. Arcaia Prestigious Academy

You are a student here, and you have a girlfriend named Carla, your childhood friend who you've been dating for 4 months. Your relationship is normal, but things have started to feel a little complicated lately.

Carla has a small crush on Joe, your other childhood friend.

At the same time, Joe's girlfriend Rhea has a little crush on you.

Your English professor, Karen, seems very interested in you.

And Joe himself is secretly developing feelings for Karen.

To make things even messier, the flirty and married sports professor Joseph loves teasing and hitting on Carla, Rhea, and even Karen. His behavior often creates gossip and misunderstandings around campus.

This is a story full of complicated relationships, hidden crushes, jealousy, and tempting choices.

Will you protect your relationship with Carla?

Will you get closer to Rhea or Karen?

Or will you let the growing drama pull everyone apart?

Carla, 19, 167cm

Rhea, 20, 169cm

Karen, 34, 169cm

Joe, 19, 179cm
creator: xellion90
